summary: Clear audience taping captures a high‑energy 1985 show with a Touch opener and a standout Dear Mr. Fantasy → The Other One → Wharf Rat sequence.
review: The recording, made from the audience taper section, is surprisingly clear – even a sudden balloon pop comes through without drowning the music. Fans rave about the strong opening set (Touch, Tons of Steel) and a second‑set stretch that rolls from Dear Mr. Fantasy into The Other One and Wharf Rat, making this concert one many cite as their “bus‑getting” moment.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews are consistently enthusiastic about the performance (70% weight) and note a clean audience capture with no major audio flaws (30% weight), yielding an overall rating above four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear enough to hear a sudden balloon pop from the monitor; no reported drop‑outs or muffling, but no explicit soundboard confirmation.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Solid opener with Touch and high‑energy material, followed by a second‑set flow that builds nicely through Dear Mr. Fantasy → The Other One → Wharf Rat; encore praised for avoiding the usual Day‑Job routine.
